retrieved_result: Things To Do Things To Do Take a vacation you won't need photos to remember Whether you’re planning a day trip, weekend getaway or weeklong vacation, there’s no shortage of things to do in North Carolina. There’s a depth and a richness – new attractions to explore, familiar activities to experience in fresh ways
